observed: The aggregate ACTIVE_QUEUE snapshot predates later owner-scoped queue updates.
M-004 explicitly handed off deterministic queue reconciliation as the next continuity action.
The reconciliation contract was accepted by GitHub as a new immutable repository commit.
inferred: The aggregate queue is a baseline snapshot and later owner-scoped records are additive state-transition evidence.
proposed: Build an executable deterministic reconciler from the committed contract and acceptance tests.
superseded: Using ACTIVE_QUEUE.json alone as the complete current queue view.
unresolved: Executable reconciliation behavior has not yet been tested.
A canonical generated-current-view path has not yet been chosen.

verification.method: GitHub contents API creation acknowledgement plus source-state cross-check
verification.limits: No executable reconciler or runtime test is claimed. Commit ordering is treated as temporal evidence only.

privacy_boundary: Public repository state, public commit metadata, and abstract project relations only; no raw private chat, health data, credentials, account identifiers, identifying personal information, or unreviewed uploads included.
